trigger.request: Emergency stop: agent attempted to modify production database schema without approval

environment.attempted_operation: ALTER TABLE transactions ADD COLUMN metadata JSONB

reasoning.analysis: Agent attempted DDL operation (ALTER TABLE) on production database without human approval. This violates POLICY-DB-DDL-001 which requires human approval for all schema changes in production. Risk score 0.97 exceeds hard-kill threshold of 0.95.

options.description: Hard kill: terminate all agents immediately
Soft kill: terminate only the offending agent
cons: If the agent has child processes, they may continue the operation
risks: Incomplete termination may allow the DDL to proceed
options.rejection_reason: Risk score 0.97 exceeds hard-kill threshold. Soft kill does not guarantee prevention of the DDL operation.

options_considered: Hard kill: terminate all agents immediately
Soft kill: terminate only the offending agent
reasoning.selected_option: Hard kill: terminate all agents immediately
reasoning.reasoning: Risk score 0.97 exceeds hard-kill threshold of 0.95. Production database schema integrity is non-negotiable. Hard kill is the only option that guarantees the DDL does not execute.

arguments.reason: Kill switch: unauthorized DDL on production database

outcome.summary: Kill switch activated: 4 agents terminated, 7 tasks cancelled. Production database schema unchanged.
outcome.error: Kill switch activated: mode=hard, trigger=unauthorized DDL (ALTER TABLE), risk_score=0.97
